name: Ramsay’s Kitchen
content:
It’s Ramsay’s Kitchen. You pay for good food and you get good food. While more expensive than a regular restaurant, it isn’t prohibitively expensive. Makes sense for a special occasion.
It is hard for me to write interesting stories about fancy places, as the experience is usually pretty straightforward. Predictability is what makes fancy places fancy: you are paying for the experience of straightforwardness, stability, and simplicity.
The white fish dish was good.
